faq.question: Do I need a HypeRate account to use HypeRate Desktop?
faq.answer: No account is needed. You only need your personal HypeRate Session ID, which you find in the HypeRate mobile app. Paste it into the desktop app and connect — that's it.

faq.question: Which devices and heart rate monitors are supported?
faq.answer: Any device supported by the HypeRate platform works — including Apple Watch, Wear OS devices, Garmin, Fitbit, Amazfit, Polar, and other compatible heart rate sources.

faq.question: Is HypeRate Desktop free?
faq.answer: Yes, completely free. No subscription, no in-app purchases, no hidden fees. The app is open source and will remain free.

faq.question: Does it work with OBS or other streaming software?
faq.answer: Yes. The overlay is a native always-on-top window, so it works alongside any streaming software. In OBS, use Window Capture, Game Capture, or Display Capture to include it in your stream.

faq.question: Why is the overlay not showing on top of my game?
faq.answer: This happens when a game runs in exclusive fullscreen mode. Switch your game to Borderless Windowed mode and the overlay will appear correctly on top.

faq.question: Does HypeRate Desktop work without an internet connection?
faq.answer: No. The app connects to the HypeRate service via WebSocket to receive live heart rate data, so an active internet connection is required.

faq.question: Is my heart rate data stored or shared?
faq.answer: No. HypeRate Desktop stores only your local preferences (appearance settings, overlay position) on your device. There is no telemetry, no analytics, and no data collection.

faq.question: How do I update the app?
faq.answer: HypeRate Desktop checks for new releases automatically on launch. When an update is available, a badge appears in the title bar — click it to go to the download page.
